hero.description: Regulatory compliance and specialized technical support for mining, construction, industry and infrastructure companies.

about.title: Experience and Commitment to Excellence
about.description1: CCONEX Constructores & Consultores is a Peruvian company with over 10 years of experience providing comprehensive technical solutions to the mining, construction, industry and infrastructure sectors.
about.description2: Our multidisciplinary team of engineers and specialists ensures regulatory compliance and quality in every project, backed by ISO certifications and a solid track record in the national market.

mision.title: Mission
mision.description: To provide comprehensive technical solutions in engineering, environment and industrial safety, ensuring regulatory compliance and customer satisfaction.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be the leading consulting firm in Peru, recognized for our technical excellence, environmental commitment and contribution to the country's sustainable development.

valores.title: Values
valores.description: Punctuality, Commitment and Empathy. These principles guide every project and relationship with our clients and communities.

sectors.title: Sectors We Serve
sectors.description: Proven experience in Peru's most demanding sectors

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.description: Our clients' satisfaction is our best letter of introduction

items.name: Carlos Mendoza
items.content: CCONEX transformed our environmental management. Their technical team is exceptional and they met all regulatory deadlines. Highly recommended.

items.name: María Fernández
items.content: CCONEX's environmental consulting allowed us to obtain all the necessary permits for our infrastructure project. Professionalism and seriousness.

items.name: Roberto Sánchez
items.content: Thanks to CCONEX we achieved ISO 45001 certification in record time. Their knowledge of Peruvian regulations is unmatched.

items.name: Ana Torres
items.content: CCONEX's waste management service is impeccable. Punctual, professional and committed to the environment.

howWeWork.title: How We Work
howWeWork.description: A structured process that guarantees quality results

diagnostico.title: Diagnosis
diagnostico.description: Initial project assessment to identify needs, regulatory requirements and work scope.

inspeccion.title: Technical Inspection
inspeccion.description: Technical site visit to collect detailed information on current conditions and specific requirements.

propuesta.title: Proposal
propuesta.description: Detailed technical and economic proposal with defined timeline and scope.

ejecucion.title: Execution
ejecucion.description: Project development with periodic supervision, quality control and progress reports.

entrega.title: Delivery & Follow-up
entrega.description: Results delivery, documentation and post-project follow-up to ensure continued compliance.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.description: Backed by the most demanding international standards

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We are ready to serve your project

footer.descripcion: Comprehensive Solutions in Engineering, Environmental Consulting and Industrial Safety. Over 10 years of experience supporting projects throughout Peru.

ctaSection.title: Request a no-obligation quote
ctaSection.description: Our technical team is ready to serve your project. Tell us your needs and we will provide the best solution.

sanitarios.title: Portable Toilets
sanitarios.description: High-quality portable toilet rental for construction sites and projects with regular maintenance and full sanitary compliance.
sanitarios.heroDescription: We provide comprehensive sanitation solutions for construction projects, events and remote areas. Our toilets meet all hygiene and comfort standards.
features: High quality and durable portable toilets
Ideal for construction sites, events and remote areas
benefits: Comfort and hygiene for your staff
Flexible quantities based on project needs

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We analyze your project needs to determine the quantity and type of portable toilets required.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We deliver and install on-site with strategic placement for staff comfort.

process.title: Maintenance
process.description: Regular cleaning, disinfection and supply replenishment service.

process.title: Removal
process.description: At project completion, we remove the toilets and handle responsible final disposal.

transporte.title: Waste Transport & Logistics
transporte.description: Specialized waste transport and logistics service with certified vehicles and trained personnel.
transporte.heroDescription: We manage the transport of hazardous and non-hazardous waste with full traceability, regulatory compliance and environmental responsibility.

process.title: Planning
process.description: We design the transport route and logistics based on waste type and location.

process.title: Collection
process.description: We collect waste with specialized and certified vehicles.

process.title: Transport
process.description: We transport waste with complete traceability and proper documentation.

process.title: Delivery
process.description: We deliver to authorized treatment plants with receipt confirmation.

residuos.title: Waste Management
residuos.description: Comprehensive solutions for responsible solid waste management, complying with current environmental regulations.
residuos.heroDescription: We offer a complete waste management service from diagnosis to final disposal, ensuring compliance with DSG-RS regulations.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We evaluate your company's waste generation, composition and volumes.

process.title: Management Plan
process.description: We develop the waste management plan according to current regulations.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: We train your staff and establish segregation and storage protocols.

process.title: Monitoring
process.description: We monitor and report on waste management continuously.

valorizacion.title: Waste Valorization
valorizacion.description: Transformation of waste into raw materials or products with economic and environmental value.
valorizacion.heroDescription: We convert waste into resources. We identify and manage valorization opportunities to maximize the recovery of your waste.
benefits: Compliance with Solid Waste General Law

process.title: Identification
process.description: We analyze your waste to identify valorization opportunities.

process.title: Connection
process.description: We connect with authorized recovery and recycling plants.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: We establish segregation and storage protocols for valorization.

process.title: Certification
process.description: We issue valorization certificates and circular economy reports.

equipos.title: Equipment
equipos.description: Rental and sale of specialized equipment for construction, mining and civil works projects.
equipos.heroDescription: We provide state-of-the-art equipment for your projects, with technical support and maintenance included.
features: Rental and sale of specialized equipment
Equipment for construction, mining and civil works

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We evaluate your project's equipment needs.

process.title: Quote
process.description: We present rental or purchase options with the best conditions.

process.title: Delivery
process.description: We deliver the equipment with training and user manuals.

process.title: Support
process.description: We provide maintenance and technical assistance throughout the operation.

ambiental.title: Environmental Management
ambiental.description: Comprehensive environmental consulting and solutions for companies and development projects.
ambiental.heroDescription: Our environmental engineering team manages studies, permits and management plans to ensure your project complies with all MINAM regulations.

process.title: Study
process.description: We develop comprehensive environmental studies according to current legislation.

process.title: Management
process.description: We manage permits and licenses before the competent authorities.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: We establish environmental management plans and monitoring protocols.

process.title: Follow-up
process.description: We conduct continuous monitoring and environmental compliance reports.

seguridad.title: Occupational Health & Safety
seguridad.description: OHSAS, Law 29783, SUNAFIL audits, training, emergency plans and industrial safety.
seguridad.heroDescription: We implement your OHSAS from scratch or strengthen it to ensure your staff's safety and compliance with Law 29783.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We evaluate the current state of your company's OHSAS.

process.title: Design
process.description: We design the management system according to regulations and your company's reality.

process.title: Training
process.description: We train all personnel in occupational health and safety.

process.title: Audit
process.description: We conduct internal audits and prepare for SUNAFIL inspection.

ingenieria.title: Engineering & Architecture
ingenieria.description: Civil engineering, architecture, design, supervision and project management services.
ingenieria.heroDescription: Our team of engineers and architects develops construction projects with the highest standards of quality, innovation and regulatory compliance.
benefits: Projects delivered with quality and on time
Comprehensive advice from start to finish

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We listen to your needs and define the project scope.

process.title: Design
process.description: We develop architectural and structural designs with BIM technology.

process.title: Construction
process.description: We supervise construction execution with quality and schedule control.

process.title: Delivery
process.description: We deliver the project with complete technical documentation and warranties.
